url.title: Target URL
url.description: A PropertyFinder URL — either a single property page (e.g. .../apartment-for-sale/...-12345678.html) or a search/listing page (e.g. /en/search?...). The scraper auto-detects which mode to run. If left empty, the actor falls back to a default UAE search URL.

startPage.title: Start Page
startPage.description: Pagination start page (only used for search URLs, ignored for single property URLs).

endPage.title: End Page
endPage.description: Pagination end page (only used for search URLs, ignored for single property URLs).

maxResults.title: Max Results
maxResults.description: Maximum number of property listings to scrape. Only applies to search URLs — single property URLs always return exactly one result regardless of this value. Default: 5.

proxy.title: Proxy Configuration
proxy.description: Optional. Leave off / disabled to run without a proxy. Turn on Apify Proxy (UAE suggested) or provide a custom proxy string only if you need one — residential proxies help avoid DataDome blocks on large-scale runs.

saveToMongo.title: Export to MongoDB
saveToMongo.description: Toggle real-time saving (upsert) to a MongoDB database.

mongoUri.title: MongoDB URI
mongoUri.description: MongoDB connection string. Required only when 'Export to MongoDB' is enabled.
